strengths: Extensive Engineering & AI Builder Fluency: Brings over 18 years of software and infrastructure engineering experience, easily surpassing the 15-year minimum, coupled with recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.

Entrepreneurial & Cloud Architecture Experience: Fulfills the preferred startup experience qualification as the Founder of GISCollective, where he architected an open-source, event-driven Geo-Data platform deployed on Kubernetes.

Proven Ability to Inspire and Educate: Strongly aligns with the requirement to inspire others internally and externally through his extensive track record of organizing refactoring dojos, teaching technical workshops, and speaking at conferences.
concerns: Seniority and Scope Gap: His recent roles have been at the Senior and Staff levels, which may require a step up to fully encompass the strategic, Director-level scope expected of this Principal Engineer position.

Depth of AI Strategy Recognition: While he possesses hands-on AI infrastructure experience, he lacks the preferred Master's/PhD in an AI-related field and long-term recognized industry expertise specifically in AI strategy.
Strategic Customer Advisory: The resume does not explicitly demonstrate experience advising high-level strategic enterprise customers and partners on cloud and AI adoption.
response.justification: Bogdan presents a strong, highly technical profile that comfortably exceeds the 15-year engineering requirement while demonstrating exactly the hands-on AI builder fluency the role prefers. His recent work developing AI-agent infrastructure directly aligns with the AI-powered product development focus, and his ongoing role as a startup founder proves his ability to innovate and build cloud platforms from the ground up. Furthermore, his exceptional dedication to sharing knowledge—evidenced by conference talks, workshops, and internal dojos—perfectly positions him to fulfill the core responsibility of inspiring technical teams. While he may need to adapt to the Director-level strategic advisory scope, his profound technical versatility, entrepreneurial drive, and recent AI tooling experience make him a highly compelling candidate with immense upside for driving technical innovation.
